title: Bajaj Auto Global Group is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Bajaj Auto Global Group is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Quality Control Engineer with drive and ambition, Bajaj Auto Global Group in Lucknow is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bajaj Auto Global Group:
Bajaj Auto Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Auto Global Group!
